Fig. 4. Encoder of the multimodal transformer of Section 3. Wind features are embedded with positional encoding, and passed through N stacked encoder blocks to produce a memory tensor M for cross-modal conditioning in the decoder.

Fig. 5. Decoder of the multimodal transformer of Section 3. Given the past acceleration sequence, the decoder applies masked self-attention and cross-attention over the encoder memory M. A linear head maps the decoded states to accelerations, generating autoregressively the future sequence.
